distIndexGzipBytes.note: Current preview gzip size plus a 10% release guard.

normalizeMediumMs.note: Best of three median batches plus the larger of 15% or a 1ms CI-noise floor.

diffMediumMs.note: Best of three median batches after adding graphDiff plus the larger of 15% or a 1ms CI-noise floor.

topologyMediumMs.note: Best of three median batches plus the larger of 15% or a 1ms CI-noise floor.

indexesMediumMs.note: Best of three median batches plus the larger of 15% or a 1ms CI-noise floor.

spatialIndexMediumMs.note: Best of three median batches plus the larger of 15% or a 1ms CI-noise floor.
